summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with proven experience integrating LLMs into production applications. Shipped a real-time AI interview platform using Anthropic Claude with a full evaluation and scoring pipeline, and a production RAG developer tool built on LangChain, OpenAI, and Pinecone with end-to-end CI/CD on AWS and Vercel. Proficient in Python and TypeScript across the full stack from data pipelines to React frontends, and experienced building AI systems that are testable, measurable, and reliably deployed.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Large Language Models (LLMs), LangChain, LlamaIndex, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, HuggingFace Transformers, Prompt Engineering, Evaluation Pipelines, NLP, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
skills.infra: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
